auth.emailVerificationDescription: Your email address has not been verified yet. Please verify your email to continue.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.phoneVerificationDescription: Your mobile number has not been verified yet. Please verify your phone number to continue.
auth.identifierRequired: Email or mobile number is required
auth.googleLoginComingSoon: Google login will be implemented later.
auth.githubLoginComingSoon: GitHub login will be implemented later.
auth.twitterLoginComingSoon: Twitter login will be implemented later.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address or mobile number and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.info: You will receive a password reset link or a one-time password (OTP) depending on the selected login method.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset instructions have been sent successfully.
forgotPassword.error: Unable to process your request. Please try again.

common.serverUnavailable: Unable to connect to the server.

register.title: Create Account
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long

otp.title: Verify Account
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit verification code sent to your email or mobile.
otp.resent: A new verification code has been sent.
otp.invalid: Please enter a valid 6-digit verification code.
otp.verificationSuccessful: Your account has been verified successfully.
